title: Keep Mme. Le Pen Away From Legitimate French Society
summary: There are a number of reasons why Marine Le Pen should not be elected President of France, apart from the fact that she has headed a neo-Fascist political party that was founded by her father, the former military officer and parliamentary deputy, Jean-Marie Le Pen.
body: There are a number of reasons why Marine Le Pen should not be elected President of France, apart from the fact that she has headed a neo-Fascist political party that was founded by her father, the former military officer and parliamentary deputy, Jean-Marie Le Pen. The French are a people who respect history and tradition though there is a contradictory iconoclasm fostered by a strand of the French Revolution. By extension, there is a French respect for families and family traditions. This is why, to my mind, it is unthinkable that a presidential candidate whose father urinated on Algerian prisoners of war during the revolt of 1954–1962, and in addition denied the Holocaust as a "point of detail" in history, should accede to the grandeur of the French presidency and live in the residence known as the Élysée Palace. Furthermore, since the strengthening of the Presidency introduced by Charles de Gaulle, it now matters more than ever who is the French President. So the watchword for the May 7 runoff election should be a rallying around a unity candidate, Emmanuel Macron, whose familial roots go back to rural southwest France and thus appeals to the French mythology of the virtues of peasant life, while at the same time representing what is a unique French meritocracy. result.main_content_en: The article argues against Marine Le Pen's election as French President, citing her leadership of a neo-Fascist party founded by her father, Jean-Marie Le Pen. It emphasizes the importance of French history and family tradition, condemning the candidate's father for his actions during the Algerian war and Holocaust denial. Given the strengthened role of the French presidency since de Gaulle, the author contends it is crucial to prevent such a figure from attaining the office. The piece calls for rallying around the unity candidate, Emmanuel Macron, whose roots in rural France and representation of French meritocracy are presented as the preferable alternative.
result.main_content_zh: 本文强烈反对玛丽娜·勒庞当选法国总统，理由是她领导着一个由其父亲让-玛丽·勒庞创立的新法西斯主义政党。文章强调了法国历史与家庭传统的重要性，并谴责勒庞父亲在阿尔及利亚战争期间的行为以及其对大屠杀的否认。鉴于自戴高乐以来法国总统职权的强化，作者认为阻止这样的人物获得这一职位至关重要。文章呼吁围绕团结候选人埃马纽埃尔·马克龙进行动员，其来自法国西南乡村的根基及其所代表的法国独特的精英治理模式，被描绘为更可取的替代选择。
